name: Pig in the Blanket
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash cabbage leaves and place them in boiling water for 5 minutes. Drain.
2. Mix sausage and rice. Roll up in cabbage leaves, fastening with toothpicks.
3. Place rolls in the bottom of a large pan surrounded by extra cabbage leaves.
4. Brown pork chops. Pour tomatoes and sauerkraut over cabbage rolls.
5. Add browned pork chops (liquid should cover). Season with salt and pepper.
6. Cook 4 hours on low heat, covered tightly.
Serves 6
